project.name: ITIL-Management-System
project.description: ITILプロセス準拠のインシデント・サービスリクエスト・変更管理システム

goal.title: ITIL管理システム本番リリース
goal.description: インシデント管理・サービスリクエスト管理・変更管理の完全実装と本番リリース

success_patterns: TASK-001: FastAPI async stack with mocked tests
TASK-002: ITIL incident management core - backend API + frontend UI + 140 backend tests + 22 frontend tests
TASK-003: Service request management with approval workflow - 169 backend tests, full frontend CRUD+approval UI
TASK-004: Change request management with 9-state workflow - 44 backend tests, full frontend CRUD+approve/reject/transition UI
TASK-005: Dashboard with ITIL metrics summary - 7 backend tests, DashboardPage with StatCards for all 3 modules
TASK-006: README.md with full ITIL system documentation, architecture diagrams, API endpoints, workflow diagrams
TASK-007: Audit log API + User management UI + Profile page + admin sidebar menu - 19 new backend tests (total 239)
TASK-008: Frontend component tests expanded from 22 to 85 (63 new tests) - Dashboard, Incidents, ServiceRequests, ChangeRequests, Approvals, AdminUsers, AuditLogs, Profile

TASK-009: Notification system - backend (Notification model+schema+service+API, 11 tests, total 250) + frontend (types, API, hooks, NotificationsPage, Header bell badge, sidebar nav, 13 tests, total 98)
TASK-010: SLA policy management - backend API CRUD (sla_policies.py, 10 tests, total 260) + frontend (types, API client, hooks, AdminSLAPoliciesPage, sidebar nav, 12 tests, total 110)
TASK-011: Incident search filters + SLA policy enforcement backend (incidents.py enhanced, incident_service.py, 335 backend tests total)
TASK-012: Problem management backend - model, schema, service, workflow, API router, 2 new test files (test_problems_api, test_problem_workflow)
TASK-013: ServiceCatalogItem CRUD API + tests (test_service_catalog_api.py, 38 new tests)
TASK-014: FulfillmentTask CRUD API with auto-completed_at + CAB vote upsert + ChangeSchedule calendar endpoint + Alembic migrations 007/008 (335 total tests passing)

TASK-015: Service Catalog UI + fulfillment task support - types (FulfillmentTask/ServiceCatalogItem), serviceCatalogApi, fulfillmentTasksApi, useServiceCatalog/useFulfillmentTasks hooks, ServiceCatalogPage with card grid + request modal, detail page fulfillment task section, 10 new tests (120 frontend tests total)

TASK-016: Problem management frontend - types (problem.ts), API client (problems.ts), hooks (use-problems.ts), ProblemListPage with status/priority/known-error filters + pagination, CreateProblemPage with priority select + optional root_cause/workaround fields, ProblemDetailPage with TransitionPanel + LinkedIncidentsList + StatusHistory, status-badge components, sidebar nav, 34 new tests (154 frontend tests total)
